sprint.goal: Effective implementation of Hi-Fi v2, starting with ROSS
sprint.summary: Turn the v2 ROSS scaffold into a real, data-wired feature. v2 stays flag-ON behind /ross.html until soaked. Scope includes the full v1 multi-tab admin redesigned in Hi-Fi v2.

phases.name: Project Status dashboard + sidebar cleanup
phases.summary: Self-meta tracker built in Hi-Fi v2; sidebar bug fixes (active state, FA icons, BS5 syntax, grouping). Shipped in PR #16. CORS fix for preview channels in PR #17.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — gap analysis & spec
phases.summary: Audit v2 module + v1 cloud functions + handoff design. Map each service signature to RTDB / Cloud Function backing. Deliverable: docs/plans/2026-04-30-ross-v2-implementation.md. Surprise: home feed already wired behind ROSS_HOME_REAL_DATA flag — Phase 2 in original plan was already done.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — wire right-rail + first-run findings
phases.summary: Replace getHomeSidebar() and getFirstRunFindings() bodies with real RTDB reads (tablesByLocation, queueIndex, guests, stockUsage, salesData aggregator). Drop shift-gap suggestion until staff-schedule data exists; banner first-run findings that lack a data source.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — action handlers
phases.summary: Wire button click handlers on /ross.html. Single dispatch(action) helper. Includes new rossV2Snooze Cloud Function + ross/v2Snoozes/{uid}/{cardId} RTDB node + read-side filter.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — admin redesign (single SPA)
phases.summary: Redesign the v1 admin tabs (Workflows / Builder / Templates / Staff / Reports) as Hi-Fi v2 components inside /ross.html, routed via ?tab= URL param. No new Cloud Functions — pure UI work against the existing rossGetWorkflows / rossManageTask / etc. surface. Biggest slice of the sprint (3–5 sessions).

phases.name: ROSS v2 — onboarding wired
phases.summary: Wire /onboarding-ross-hello.html to the real getFirstRunFindings() output from Phase 2. Add 'illustrative' banner where data source missing.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — askRoss (LLM)
phases.summary: New rossChat Cloud Function with Anthropic SDK + prompt caching. Eval harness (20-prompt golden set). Cost cap + secrets. Not part of this sprint — tracked as a separate sprint.

tasks.label: Sidebar bugs: active state, fa-sparkles, ml-auto, grouping, data-bs-parent
npm run build passes; smoke test on preview channel
Allow preview channels in Cloud Functions CORS allowlist
Write ROSS v2 implementation spec doc
User decisions on 5 open questions (right-rail real-time, shift-gap, findings honesty, admin SPA model, snooze model)

inProgress.summary: Phase 1 — ROSS v2 gap analysis & spec doc

recentlyCompleted.title: fix(cors): allow Firebase Hosting preview channels

high: Food cost open PR — review and merge
medium: Hi-Fi v2 → v1 promotions (guests, queue, analytics, campaigns, receipts)
